text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I heard Tamamo Cross is going to<n>race Gold City,
so I head to the track<n>to watch.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
It's Gold City! Even in a tracksuit<n>she's just so
gorgeous...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Sure is a lotta people here! All<n>here to see
you, I'm assuming.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yeahhh... sorry about that.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Guess word got out about our race<n>somehow.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey, don't sweat it! Easier to get<n>fired up when
there's a big crowd<n>watching!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
True that... Now I can show all these<n>people my
skills as a runner.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: All right, City, you can do it. This race<n>is yours!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The race kicks off under the gaze of<n>many
spectators.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'll show ya what the White Lightning<n>of Naniwa
is all about!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Gah! I'm not... done yet!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The fierce race results in a narrow<n>defeat for
Gold City.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! Why, why, why?! I had that!<n>How did I
screw it up?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...I have to keep practicing. I won't<n>stop until I
make my mark.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...I get yer frustration, but is that really<n>
necessary?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Look around ya, City.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
She lost, but Gold City still made it a<n>great race.
Maybe I should keep an<n>eye on her.

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! That last push at the end was<n>stellar! I bet
she can even make G1 at<n>the rate she's going!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh, shoot...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I guess it's not as bad as I thought.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: We should do this again. And nexttime, I'm not losing!

That's the spirit! Next time we race<n>will be the
real deal, then!
